query:
-- Total de imóveis para venda
SELECT 'Total imóveis para venda' as tipo, COUNT(*) as quantidade FROM properfyProperties WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
UNION ALL
-- Total com status de baixa (qualquer data)
SELECT 'Total com status de baixa', COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
UNION ALL
-- Distribuição por mês de dteTermination
SELECT CONCAT('dteTermination em ', DATE_FORMAT(dteTermination, '%Y-%m')), COUNT(*) FROM properfyProperties WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale' AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION') AND dteTermination IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(dteTermination, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY DATE_FORMAT(dteTermination, '%Y-%m') DESC LIMIT 5
